title: Tank (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tank''' may refer to the following items:

==[[Canon]]==
*The ground vehicle type called [[tank]]
*The individual named [[Tank (individual)|Tank]]

===Non-canon===
*[[Ahsoka Tano#LEGO|Ahsoka Tano]], who once masqueraded as a clone trooper named "Tank"

==[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]==
*[[Janek Sunber/Legends|Janek Sunber]], nicknamed Tank
*[[Tahnchukka]], nicknamed Tank
*The ground vehicle type named [[Tank (vehicle)/Legends|tank]]

|de=Tank
}}
